name: RogueRampage
short_description: roguelike FPS! Use time-stop, barriers, and other powerful skills to defeat enemies. Eliminating foes or landing headshots grants XP to level up and gain items. Enemies grow stronger, testing your skills. Choose skills and gear to craft your build and survive. Adapt, strategize, and conquer!
detailed_description:
🔹 Simple Yet Deep High-Speed Action

Experience exhilarating shooting action with intuitive FPS controls!

Shoot, dodge, and power up as you fight to survive against relentless waves of enemies.

🔹 Endless Strategies Born from Growth and Randomness

Defeat enemies to level up! Enhance your core stats and skills to gain the upper hand in battle.

Each time you level up, choose one of three randomly selected items. The path to power is in your hands!

Find hidden treasure chests on the map to acquire even more items.

Special items obtained from bosses will further turn the tide of battle in your favor!

🔹 Builds That Change Every Playthrough

Items come with powerful unique effects and appear randomly.

Stat boosts, explosive chain reactions, recoil reduction—your playstyle will shift dramatically based on the items you find!

Use tactics and strategy to survive as long as possible and achieve the highest score!
